title: Baltarian freighter
content:
{{Top|ncl}}
{{Cut|canon=1|Star Wars drafts}}
A '''Baltarian [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]]''', docked at [[Gordon]] on [[Aquilae (The Star Wars)|Aquilae]], was used by [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia]], [[Biggs Darklighter/Legends|Biggs]], [[Windy Starkiller|Windy]], [[R2-D2/Legends|Artwo]], [[C-3PO/Legends|Threepio]] and [[Annikin Starkiller]] to try to escape the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire's]] occupation.

Baltarians wore distinctive clothing, making it possible for the adults to blend in as "crew"; the two boys were hidden in [[microcase]]s and put into hibernation, powered by [[Kane Starkiller]]'s final sacrifice of his chest power source.

The ship was cramped, with narrow hallways and a small cockpit. Unfortunately for the heroes, the supposed [[Captain/Legends|captain]] of the vessel was none other than [[Espaa Valorum|Valorum]], a [[Sith/Legends|Sith]].

In the rest of the ship was "Hold B" and "Hold G", where the imprisoned "crew" was held. The [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]], however, were not so early subdued, and they free everyone else. They escaped the freighter before it takes off.

==Behind the scenes==
*As the heroes exit the freighter they must squeeze through an quickly closing hatch, similar to the [[Blast door/Legends|blast doors]] on the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|Death Star]] in [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|Episode IV]].

*The Baltarian freighter eventually became the [[AA-9 Coruscant freighter/Legends|AA-9 Coruscant freighter]]
